evidence_summary: Transition the group from the active river crossing into a vast, visually overwhelming meadow. The environment must shift from high-energy movement to a heavy, lethargic atmosphere where the beauty of the scarlet poppies masks an insidious threat.

The group continues their journey along the riverbank toward the Yellow Brick Road. They wander into a vast, beautiful meadow filled with scarlet poppies. The visual beauty masks the deadly scent of the flowers.
Relief $\rightarrow$ Tranquility/Lethargy.
Characters exiting the sunny, active swift_river_crossing.
Characters moving with heavy limbs and drooping eyes within the poppy field.
The group wanders into the meadow and succumbs to the scent of the poppies.

evidence_summary: Transition the group from the active river crossing into a vast, visually overwhelming meadow. The environment must shift from high-energy movement to a heavy, lethargic atmosphere where the beauty of the scarlet poppies masks an insidious threat.

The group continues their journey along the riverbank toward the Yellow Brick Road. They wander into a vast, beautiful meadow filled with scarlet poppies. The visual beauty masks the deadly scent of the flowers.
Relief $\rightarrow$ Tranquility/Lethargy.
Characters exiting the sunny, active swift_river_crossing.
Characters moving with heavy limbs and drooping eyes within the poppy field.
The group wanders into the meadow and succumbs to the scent of the poppies.

evidence_summary: Transition the group from the active river crossing into a vast, visually overwhelming meadow. The environment must shift from high-energy movement to a heavy, lethargic atmosphere where the beauty of the scarlet poppies masks an insidious threat.

The group continues their journey along the riverbank toward the Yellow Brick Road. They wander into a vast, beautiful meadow filled with scarlet poppies. The visual beauty masks the deadly scent of the flowers.
Relief $\rightarrow$ Tranquility/Lethargy.
Characters exiting the sunny, active swift_river_crossing.
Characters moving with heavy limbs and drooping eyes within the poppy field.
The group wanders into the meadow and succumbs to the scent of the poppies.
